data.body: Ticket dystopic-ashy-mara CLOSED + signed (completion-verifier: PASS) against rebased worktree HEAD 5eff240e8. Landing in progress on Gerrit 620: PS1 and PS2 both got Verified+1 (CI SUCCESS), but the auto-lander's rebase drops the Autosubmit vote so it stalled; main advanced 11 commits so PS2 was not fast-forward. Manually rebased onto origin/main -> PS3 (5eff240e8, same Change-Id/trailers), re-set Autosubmit+1, CI re-running. Will submit within the FFO window once PS3 Verified+1.
